meta.source: 新建 Microsoft Excel 工作表.xlsx
meta.note: backtestFull uses Sheet1 column A as date and column C as continuous backtest equity. liveRecent uses column D as live change/PnL; when column A is blank, dates are continued day by day from the last available date. comparison uses backtestChange = backtestEquity - backtestEquity at the first live date, so it can be plotted with liveChange.
